summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Italian family budget management app (Focolare). Backend API testing showed 100% success (25/25 tests). Frontend testing revealed session persistence issues preventing full workflow completion. Mobile responsive design is functional but has navigation interaction issues.

critical_bugs.issue: User sessions are not persisting - users get logged out unexpectedly and redirected to login page
critical_bugs.selector: Affects dashboard access after family creation

critical_bugs.issue: Mobile bottom navigation items are not clickable - elements exist but are not visible/interactive

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard does not update properly after family creation - session appears to be lost

design_issues.issue: Bottom navigation tabs are present but not clickable on mobile viewport (390x844)

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: All 25 API tests passed (100% success rate)
✅ Backend: User registration and login APIs working
✅ Backend: Bank account management with mocked Plaid sync working
✅ Frontend: User registration form works correctly
✅ Frontend: Mobile bottom navigation bar is present
✅ Frontend: Family creation prompt displays correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (session persistence and mobile navigation issues prevent full workflow testing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Critical session persistence issue preventing users from staying logged in after operations like family creation. Mobile navigation is present but not interactive. These issues block full user workflows and need immediate attention.
